sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2700" key="ai)su/mnion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰσύμν-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n2700.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">council-chamber</tr_> at Megara, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:43:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.43.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
